initial_program:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
n_cols(M) :- N = #count{C : input(_, C, _)}.
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

nonzero(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
row_len(R,N) :- N = #count{C : nonzero(R,C,Color)}.
rank(R,C,Idx) :- nonzero(R,C,Color), Idx = #count{T : nonzero(R,T,Color), T < C+1} - 1.

order1(R,Pos1) :- row_len(R,N_r), Pos1 = #count{R2 : row_len(R2,N2), (N2 > N_r)}.
offset(R,Off) :- row_len(R,N_r), Off = #count{R2 : row_len(R2,N2), (N2 = N_r), (R2 < R)}.
order(R,Pos) :- order1(R,Pos1), offset(R,Off), Pos = Pos1 + Off.

output(Rf,Cf,Color) :- order(R,Pos), Rf = Pos, rank(R,C,Idx), Cf = Idx, nonzero(R,C,Color).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).
has_nonzero(R,C) :- output(R,C,Cl), Cl != 0.
output(R,C,0) :- output_cell(R,C), not has_nonzero(R,C).

1 { output(R,C,Cl) : color(Cl) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

rounds.program_after:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
n_cols(M) :- N = #count{C : input(_, C, _)}.
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

nonzero(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
row_len(R,N) :- N = #count{C : nonzero(R,C,Color)}.
rank(R,C,Idx) :- nonzero(R,C,Color), Idx = #count{T : nonzero(R,T,Color), T < C+1} - 1.

order1(R,Pos1) :- row_len(R,N_r), Pos1 = #count{R2 : row_len(R2,N2), N2 > N_r}.
offset(R,Off) :- row_len(R,N_r), Off = #count{R2 : row_len(R2,N2), N2 = N_r, R2 < R}.
order(R,Pos) :- order1(R,Pos1), offset(R,Off), Pos = Pos1 + Off.

output(Rf,Cf,Color) :- order(R,Pos), Rf = Pos, rank(R,C,Idx), Cf = Idx, nonzero(R,C,Color).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).
has_nonzero(R,C) :- output(R,C,Cl), Cl != 0.
output(R,C,0) :- output_cell(R,C), not has_nonzero(R,C).

1 { output(R,C,Cl) : color(Cl) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

rounds.program_after:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
n_cols(M) :- row(R), nonzero(R,C2,Color), M = #count{C2 : nonzero(R,C2,Color)}.
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

nonzero(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
row_len(R,N) :- row(R), nonzero(R,C,Color), N = #count{C : nonzero(R,C,Color)}.
rank(R,C,Idx) :- nonzero(R,C,Color), Idx = #count{T : nonzero(R,T,Color), T < C+1} - 1.

order1(R,Pos1) :- row_len(R,N_r), Pos1 = #count{R2 : row_len(R2,N2), N2 > N_r}.
offset(R,Off) :- row_len(R,N_r), Off = #count{R2 : row_len(R2,N2), N2 = N_r, R2 < R}.
order(R,Pos) :- order1(R,Pos1), offset(R,Off), Pos = Pos1 + Off.

output(Rf,Cf,Color) :- order(R,Pos), Rf = Pos, rank(R,C,Idx), Cf = Idx, nonzero(R,C,Color).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).
has_nonzero(R,C) :- output(R,C,Cl), Cl != 0.
output(R,C,0) :- output_cell(R,C), not has_nonzero(R,C).

1 { output(R,C,Cl) : color(Cl) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

final_program:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
n_cols(M) :- row(R), nonzero(R,C2,Color), M = #count{C2 : nonzero(R,C2,Color)}.
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

nonzero(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
row_len(R,N) :- row(R), nonzero(R,C,Color), N = #count{C : nonzero(R,C,Color)}.
rank(R,C,Idx) :- nonzero(R,C,Color), Idx = #count{T : nonzero(R,T,Color), T < C+1} - 1.

order1(R,Pos1) :- row_len(R,N_r), Pos1 = #count{R2 : row_len(R2,N2), N2 > N_r}.
offset(R,Off) :- row_len(R,N_r), Off = #count{R2 : row_len(R2,N2), N2 = N_r, R2 < R}.
order(R,Pos) :- order1(R,Pos1), offset(R,Off), Pos = Pos1 + Off.

output(Rf,Cf,Color) :- order(R,Pos), Rf = Pos, rank(R,C,Idx), Cf = Idx, nonzero(R,C,Color).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).
has_nonzero(R,C) :- output(R,C,Cl), Cl != 0.
output(R,C,0) :- output_cell(R,C), not has_nonzero(R,C).

1 { output(R,C,Cl) : color(Cl) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).
